---
title: "TinyML: Edge & Embedded"
---

## HarvardX Professional Certificate in Tiny Machine Learning

The complete courseware from the [HarvardX TinyML Professional Certificate on edX](https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning) — 4 courses across 5 chapters covering ML fundamentals through embedded deployment and MLOps. 178 slide decks, 127 readings, and 23 supplementary materials. Originally developed by Harvard SEAS and Google TensorFlow.

```{=html}
<!-- Base URL for all TinyML courseware PDFs — change here if the source repo moves -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var BASE = 'https://github.com/tinyMLx/courseware/raw/master/edX';
  document.querySelectorAll('a[data-tinyml]').forEach(function(a) {
    a.href = BASE + '/' + a.getAttribute('data-tinyml');
    a.target = '_blank';
  });
});
</script>

<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/MLSysBook-TinyML-All.zip" class="btn-accent" target="_blank">Download All (ZIP)</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/tinyMLx/courseware/tree/master/edX" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">View Source</a>
  <a href="https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">edX Course</a>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 1: Welcome to TinyML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 1 · Course 1</span>
  <h3>Welcome to TinyML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">Core concepts, challenges, and opportunities of TinyML. Overview of the specialization, introduction to responsible AI, and getting started with Google Colab and TensorFlow.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 1–2</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Hardware Kits</a></span>

  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th class="sec-num">§</th><th>Section</th><th class="dl-col">Slides</th><th class="dl-col">Readings</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">1.1</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Course Overview</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-1-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-1-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-1-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-1-5.pdf">5</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="no-material">—</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">1.2</td>
        <td class="sec-title">The Future of ML is Tiny and Bright</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-2-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-2-4.pdf">4</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/1-2-2.pdf">2</a></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">1.3</td>
        <td class="sec-title">TinyML Challenges</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-3-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-3-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-3-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-3-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-3-7.pdf">7</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/1-3-6.pdf">6</a></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">1.4</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Getting Started</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-4-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/1-4-3.pdf">3</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/1-4-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/1-4-8.pdf">8</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 2: Introduction to (Tiny) ML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 2 · Course 1</span>
  <h3>Introduction to (Tiny) ML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">The machine learning paradigm, deep learning building blocks, CNNs, computer vision, and responsible AI design. Hands-on with loss functions, gradient descent, neural networks, and image classification.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 3–6</a></span>

  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th class="sec-num">§</th><th>Section</th><th class="dl-col">Slides</th><th class="dl-col">Readings</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">2.1</td>
        <td class="sec-title">The Machine Learning Paradigm</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-1-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-1-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-1-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-1-8.pdf">8</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-1-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-1-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-1-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">2.2</td>
        <td class="sec-title">The Building Blocks of Deep Learning</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-2-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-2-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-2-9.pdf">9</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-2-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-2-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-2-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">2.3</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Exploring ML Scenarios</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-3-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-3-4.pdf">4</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-3-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-3-6.pdf">6</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">2.4</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Building a Computer Vision Model</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-4-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-4-5.pdf">5</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-4-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-4-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-4-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/2-4-9.pdf">9</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">2.5</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Responsible AI Design</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-5-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-5-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-5-4.pdf">4</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="no-material">—</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">2.6</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Course 1 Summary</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-6-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-6-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/2-6-5.pdf">5</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/2-6-1.pdf">1</a></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 3: Applications of TinyML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 3 · Course 2</span>
  <h3>Applications of TinyML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">Real-world TinyML applications: keyword spotting, visual wake words, and anomaly detection. Covers TensorFlow Lite, quantization, data engineering, and responsible AI development.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 10–12</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Hardware Kits</a></span>

  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th class="sec-num">§</th><th>Section</th><th class="dl-col">Slides</th><th class="dl-col">Readings</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.1</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Welcome to Applications of TinyML</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-1-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-1-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-1-8.pdf">8</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-12.pdf">12</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.2</td>
        <td class="sec-title">AI Lifecycle and ML Workflow</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-2-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-2-4.pdf">4</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-2-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-2-5.pdf">5</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.3</td>
        <td class="sec-title">ML on Mobile and Edge IoT Devices (Part 1)</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-3-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-3-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-3-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-3-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-3-5.pdf">5</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.4</td>
        <td class="sec-title">ML on Mobile and Edge IoT Devices (Part 2)</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-4-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-4-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-4-6.pdf">6</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-4-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-4-7.pdf">7</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.5</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Keyword Spotting</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-11.pdf">11</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-15.pdf">15</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-20.pdf">20</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-22.pdf">22</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-23.pdf">23</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-16.pdf">16</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-17.pdf">17</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-24.pdf">24</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.6</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Data Engineering for TinyML</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-6-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-6-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-6-13.pdf">13</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.7</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Visual Wake Words</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-15.pdf">15</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-13.pdf">13</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-16.pdf">16</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.8</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Anomaly Detection</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-18.pdf">18</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.9</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Responsible AI Development</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-9-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-9-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/3-9-6.pdf">6</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/3-9-2.pdf">2</a></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">3.10</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Chapter Summary</td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="slides/3-10-1.pdf">1</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/3-10-3.pdf">3</a></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 4: Deploying TinyML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 4 · Course 3</span>
  <h3>Deploying TinyML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">End-to-end deployment with TensorFlow Lite for Microcontrollers. Covers embedded hardware/software, TFLite Micro internals, and hands-on labs deploying keyword spotting, visual wake words, and gesture recognition on Arduino.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 11, 13</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Arduino &amp; Seeed Kits</a></span>

  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th class="sec-num">§</th><th>Section</th><th class="dl-col">Slides</th><th class="dl-col">Readings</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.1</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Welcome to Deploying TinyML</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-1-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-1-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-1-7.pdf">7</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.2</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Getting Started (Hardware &amp; Software Setup)</td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="no-material">—</span></td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-13.pdf">13</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.3</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Embedded Hardware and Software</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-10.pdf">10</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-9.pdf">9</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.4</td>
        <td class="sec-title">TensorFlow Lite Micro</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-4-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-4-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-4-12.pdf">12</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.5</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Keyword Spotting (Deployment)</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-14.pdf">14</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-5-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-5-16.pdf">16</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-5-18.pdf">18</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.6</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Custom Dataset Engineering for KWS</td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="slides/4-6-2.pdf">2</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-8.pdf">8</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.7</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Visual Wake Words (Deployment)</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-8.pdf">8</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-7-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-7-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-7-9.pdf">9</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.8</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Gesture Recognition — Magic Wand</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-8-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-8-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-8-5.pdf">5</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-12.pdf">12</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.9</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Responsible AI Deployment</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-9-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-9-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-9-9.pdf">9</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/4-9-8.pdf">8</a></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">4.10</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Summary</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-10-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/4-10-3.pdf">3</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-10-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/4-10-4.pdf">4</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 5: MLOps for Scaling TinyML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 5 · Course 4</span>
  <h3>MLOps for Scaling TinyML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">Machine Learning Operations through the lens of TinyML: ML development, training operationalization, continuous training, model conversion, deployment at scale, prediction serving, continuous monitoring, and responsible AI.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 14–15</a></span>

  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th class="sec-num">§</th><th>Section</th><th class="dl-col">Slides</th><th class="dl-col">Readings</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.1</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Welcome to MLOps for Scaling TinyML</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-14.pdf">14</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-11.pdf">11</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-13.pdf">13</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-15.pdf">15</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-19.pdf">19</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.2</td>
        <td class="sec-title">MLOps: The Big Picture</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-2-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-2-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-2-6.pdf">6</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-2-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-2-5.pdf">5</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.3</td>
        <td class="sec-title">ML Development</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-15.pdf">15</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-16.pdf">16</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-18.pdf">18</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-19.pdf">19</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-11.pdf">11</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-13.pdf">13</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.4</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Training Operationalization</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-11.pdf">11</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-14.pdf">14</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-4-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-4-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-4-12.pdf">12</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.5</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Continuous Training</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-13.pdf">13</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-14.pdf">14</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-16.pdf">16</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-18.pdf">18</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-21.pdf">21</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-23.pdf">23</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-17.pdf">17</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-19.pdf">19</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.6</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Model Conversion</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-13.pdf">13</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-6-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-6-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-6-11.pdf">11</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.7</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Model Deployment</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-13.pdf">13</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-16.pdf">16</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-6.pdf">6</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-11.pdf">11</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-14.pdf">14</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.8</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Prediction Serving</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-7.pdf">7</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-16.pdf">16</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-13.pdf">13</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-14.pdf">14</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.9</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Continuous Monitoring</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-3.pdf">3</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-4.pdf">4</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-8.pdf">8</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-9.pdf">9</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-13.pdf">13</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-16.pdf">16</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-1.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-10.pdf">10</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-12.pdf">12</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-14.pdf">14</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.10</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Data &amp; Model Management</td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="slides/5-10-2.pdf">2</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/5-10-1.pdf">1</a></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.11</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Responsible AI: Transparency &amp; Sustainability</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-11-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-11-5.pdf">5</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-11-7.pdf">7</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-11-1 Responsible AI Intro.pdf">1</a>
          <a data-tinyml="readings/5-11-3 Sustainable AI.pdf">3</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="sec-num">5.12</td>
        <td class="sec-title">Summary</td>
        <td class="dl-col">
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-12-2.pdf">2</a>
          <a data-tinyml="slides/5-12-3.pdf">3</a>
        </td>
        <td class="dl-col"><a data-tinyml="readings/5-12-1.pdf">1</a></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- TEAM -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="team-box">
  <h3>The TinyMLx Team</h3>
  <p><strong>Instructors:</strong> Vijay Janapa Reddi, Laurence Moroney, Pete Warden, Lara Suzuki</p>
  <p><strong>Guest Instructor:</strong> Susan Kennedy</p>
  <p><strong>Staff Lead:</strong> Brian Plancher</p>
  <p><strong>Staff:</strong> Colby Banbury, Benjamin Brown, Dhilan Ramaprasad, J. Evan Smith, Matthew Stewart</p>
  <p><strong>Contributors:</strong> Sharad Chitlangia, Radhika Ghosal, Srivatsan Krishnan, Maximilian Lam, Mark Mazumder</p>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-note}
These materials were originally developed for the [HarvardX Professional Certificate in Tiny Machine Learning](https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning) on edX. The numbered file links (e.g., "1", "2", "4") correspond to items within each section — see the [original curriculum](tinyml/README-edx-original.md) for the full item-by-item breakdown including Colab notebooks, forum prompts, and quizzes.
:::
